Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request of default judgment against Defendant Jennifer Cheung and Defendant Joanna Cheung.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:35:41 a.m. and concluding at 11:13:13 a.m.(D505)

Brenna Fitzpatrick, Esq. Representing Plaintiff Wei Ouyang and Plaintiff Mengxue Xing who were sworn and also present via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jennifer Cheung not appearing.
Defendant Joanna Cheung not appearing.

Plaintiff's 1st amended complaint for Tortious Breach of the Implied Warranty of Habitability Violations of CA Civil Code Sections 1941 Et Seq. et al filed February 28, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Jennifer Cheung filed April 15, 2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Joanna Cheung served April 2, 2023; m ailed April 4, 2023; service effectuated on April 15, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Jennifer Cheung on June 20, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Joanna Cheung on July 24, 2023.

Counsel to provide a brief summary of the causes of action and an offer of proof as to witness testimony.
Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Declaration of Plaintiff Mengxue Xing
Exhibit B: Declaration of Plaintiff Wei Ouyang
Exhibit C: Declaration of Brenna Wood Fitzpatrick
Plaintiffs confirms that declarations made, and exhibits submitted are true and correct.

Upon totality of the evidence, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against defendants as follows:

Plaintiffs shall recover from the Defendants the following:
Damages $173,080.00
Costs $378.68
Attorney's Fees $7,000.00
Total Judgment $180,458.68

Proposed judgment as modified by the Court according to proof signed and executed this day.
